---
title: "EGAP Learning Days Abidjan 2026"
---

```{r, include=FALSE}
source("R/chapter_setup.R")
profile <- Sys.getenv("QUARTO_PROFILE", unset = "en")
if (!profile %in% c("en", "fr")) profile <- "en"
init_lecture_chapter(profile)
```

::: {.content-visible when-profile="en"}

Course notes pulled from the same lecture `.qmd` sources as the slide decks. Each **lecture is one chapter** (its own page); use the sidebar to move between lectures.

This proof of concept includes:

1. [Why experiment?](chapters/en/1_why-experiment.html)
2. [Causal inference](chapters/en/2_causalinference.html)

:::

::: {.content-visible when-profile="fr"}

Supports de cours reprenant les mêmes fichiers `.qmd` que les diapositives. Chaque **cours est un chapitre** (une page) ; utilisez la barre latérale pour naviguer.

Cette preuve de concept comprend :

1. [Pourquoi expérimenter ?](chapters/fr/1_why-experiment.html)
2. [Inférence causale](chapters/fr/2_causalinference.html)

:::
